div.p: Our commitment to transparent and respectful communication. Below is a comprehensive list of every type of email this platform sends.

These emails are critical to your account security and cannot be opted out of without locking your account.
OTP Verification: One-Time Passcodes for LoTW auth and account registration.
Account Status: Notifications when your verification is approved, rejected, or rescinded.
Security Alerts: Notifications when your email address or password is changed.

These emails are generated based on your activity and interactions on the platform.
QSO Nudges: Automated reminders to confirm pending amateur radio contacts in your logbook.
ICS Forms: Distribution of Incident Command System (ICS) forms you participate in.
Repeater Updates: Alerts regarding changes to repeaters you manage or monitor.

If you join a club, club officers may send official business.
EmComm Activations: Urgent alerts for Emergency Communications team deployments.
Net & Event Notifications: Handoffs and scheduling alerts for radio nets and club events.
If an email we send you bounces, our system will automatically notify your club officers so they can reach out to you via alternative methods (e.g., radio, phone).

Every non-critical email we send includes an explicit Unsubscribe link. When you unsubscribe, you will have the option to either mute non-critical nudges, or perform a Total Account Lockout (which disables your login, stops all emails, and freezes your websites, typically used for Silent Key hams).
div.div: Contact a Human: If you believe you are receiving emails in error, or if you need assistance managing your email preferences, please reach out to our team at admin@hams.com.
